<!-- agent-py-sidecar: auto-generated; do not delete this line to allow refresh -->
# scripts/agent_token_logger.py
# auto-generated explainer · 2026-06-13T10:00:27Z

## Purpose
agent_token_logger — wrap every Ollama call with token + purpose accounting.

Per operator 2026-06-01 token-budget mechanism + global §41.1 cost cap.

Logs to .agent/token_usage.jsonl with: ts, task_id, purpose, model,
prompt_eval_count (input), eval_count (output), total_duration_ns, status.

Auto-rolls up to .agent/token_summary.md per call.

Usage as library:
    from scripts.agent_token_logger import call
    answer = call(model="qwen2.5-coder:7b",
                  prompt="fix this fn",
                  purpose="coding",
                  task_id="TASK-042")

CLI:
    python scripts/agent_token_logger.py qwen2.5-coder:3b "hello" --purpose=planning
    python scripts/agent_token_logger.py --summary             # print table
    python scripts/agent_token_logger.py --budget 20000        # warn if any task > 20k

## Imports
- from `__future__` import annotations
- from `_` import argparse
- from `_` import json
- from `_` import os
- from `_` import sys
- from `_` import time
- from `collections` import defaultdict
- from `pathlib` import Path
- from `typing` import Any
- from `_` import requests

## Inputs
- CLI args: --purpose, --task-id, --num-ctx, --summary, --budget
- Env vars: OLLAMA_URL

## Process
### Functions
- `call(model, prompt, purpose, task_id, num_ctx)`: Call Ollama, log token usage, return the response body.
- `write_summary()`: Aggregate token_usage.jsonl → token_summary.md.
- `check_budget(threshold)`: Return number of tasks over budget. Print warnings to stderr.
- `main()`: (no docstring)

## Outputs
- Writes files (detected 1 patterns)
- Return values from functions above

## Notable inline comments
- Roll summary every 5 calls
